description: NinjaTrader 8 is open with the Control Center visible. Real daily OHLCV data for MSFT (Microsoft Corporation) from January 2023 to December 2024 is available in the NinjaTrader data directory. Perform a backtest using the 'SampleMACrossOver' strategy on the MSFT instrument with a daily bar type. The backtest should cover the period from January 1, 2023, to December 31, 2024. Ensure the performance results, including Total Net Profit and Max Drawdown, are displayed in the Strategy Analyzer.
